classificationPolicy: No APPROVED entries; AUTO-CANDIDATE is expedited review only. Cross-family and >=4-publisher groups are quarantined.

entries.availabilityTombstoneAmbiguity: Envelope present; payload/tombstone status requires enrichment
entries.candidateReason: minimum Core created metadata; later full snapshots are compatible with V1 mutation republication
entries.manualReviewReason: two same-family publishers with a unique earliest Core-created candidate; payload and first-transaction review still required
entries.mutationPath: inferable only from entity type; source paths include admin/moderation/reaction/vote/edit/delete/tip operations
